title: UndeadPandemic
description: Survive the apocalypse, or become part of it.
body:
# 🧟‍♂️ UndeadPandemic

**A Minecraft plugin that transforms your world into a full-blown post-apocalyptic survival experience.**  
Fight the infection. Purify your water. Survive the Blood Moon.  
Works on versions **1.16–1.21**, tested on **Paper**, supports **Spigot** and integrates with **Vault, WorldGuard, WorldEdit, and PlaceholderAPI**.

![UndeadPandemic Features](https://images.undeadpandemic.net/posters/undeadpandemic_poster.png)

---

## 💥 Features

- 🧪 **Zombie Infection System**  
  Water, food, and zombies are all vectors for infection. Stay clean—or become one of them.

- 🩸 **Zombie Guts Item**  
  Smear yourself in zombie remains to become invisible to the horde—until it rains.

- 🌧️ **Environmental Reactions**  
  Rain extinguishes campfires, washes away camouflage, and fills cauldrons. Survival means adaptation.

- 🌕 **Blood Moon Events**  
  Occasional night events that make zombies faster, stronger, and relentless. Loot is greater… if you survive.

- 🥩 **Passive Mobs Carry the Plague**  
  Even your livestock may turn against you. Rotten flesh is just the beginning.

- 🏆 **Rewards & Integration**  
  Gain rewards for kills. Hook into Vault economy systems, track stats via PlaceholderAPI, and protect regions using WorldGuard.

---

## 🎮 Why Choose UndeadPandemic?

🔓 Free version available  
💎 Premium version includes:
- More configurable features
- Customised mob behaviour
- Tighter integration with server tools
- Early access to new updates

![UndeadPandemic Banner](https://images.undeadpandemic.nete/posters/undeadpandemic_add-an-apocalypse.png)

---

## 📷 Gallery

> ![Zombie Infection](https://images.undeadpandemic.net/posters/zombie-infection.png)  
> *Drink at your own risk…*

> ![Blood Moon](https://images.undeadpandemic.net/posters/blood-moon.png)  
> *Hope you brought a sword.*

> ![Zombie Guts Camouflage](https://images.undeadpandemic.net/posters/zombie-guts.png)  
> *You’re one of them… for now.*

---

## 🌐 Compatibility

- Minecraft: **1.16 – 1.21**
- Server: **Spigot**, **Paper**, **Purpur**
- Dependencies:
  - ✅ [Vault](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/vault.34315/)
  - ✅ [WorldGuard](https://enginehub.org/worldguard/)
  - ✅ [WorldEdit](https://enginehub.org/worldedit/)
  - ✅ [PlaceholderAPI](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/placeholderapi.6245/)

---

## 🧪 Try It Out!

🧪 We host a **demo server** so you can try the plugin before buying!  
Play through a short scenario, survive a Blood Moon, and try out all the features firsthand.

Join now: *Coming Soon*
